issue.message: Invalid id; ID definitions **must** be of the form `@+id/name`; did you mean `@+id/title`?

The layout "album_appwidget" in layout-finger has no declaration in the base `layout` folder; this can lead to crashes when the resource is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier

The drawable "albumart_mp_unknown" in drawable-hdpi-finger has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier

The drawable "albumart_mp_unknown" in drawable-mdpi-finger has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier

The drawable "appwidget_button" in drawable-finger has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier

The drawable "appwidget_divider" in drawable-hdpi-finger has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier

The drawable "appwidget_divider" in drawable-mdpi-finger has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier
